languages.text: "Дружище, я на тебя последний паек поставил и выиграл! Сегодня нажрусь до отвала".

traits.locale_text: "Дружище, я на тебя последний паек поставил и выиграл! Сегодня нажрусь до отвала".
"Дружище, я на тебя последний паек поставил и выиграл! Сегодня нажрусь до отвала".

languages.text: "Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."
languages.original_text: "Дружище, я на тебя последний паек поставил и выиграл! Сегодня нажрусь до отвала".

traits.locale_text: "Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."
"Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."
"Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."

languages.text: "Kumpel, ich habe meine letzte Ration auf dich gesetzt und gewonnen! Ich werde mich heute Abend vollstopfen."
languages.original_text: "Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."

languages.text: "Mon pote, j'ai parié ma dernière ration sur toi et j'ai gagné ! Je vais me goinfrer tout à l'heure".
languages.original_text: "Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."

languages.text: "伙计，我把最后的口粮押在你身上，赢了！今晚我要把自己塞得满满的"
languages.original_text: "Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."

languages.text: "¡Amigo, aposté mi última ración por ti y gané! Me atiborraré esta noche".
languages.original_text: "Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."

languages.text: 「バディ、僕は最後の一杯を君に賭けて勝ったんだ！今夜は腹いっぱいにしてやる」。
languages.original_text: "Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."

languages.text: "Dostum, son istihkakımı senin üzerine yatırdım ve kazandım! Bu gece tıka basa doymuş olacağım."
languages.original_text: "Buddy, I bet my last ration on you and won! I will be stuffing myself full later tonight."
